{"projectId":"929484233158471895","sessionId":"186053101293112712","outputComponents":[{"design":{"screens":[{"screenshot":{"name":"projects/929484233158471895/files/3c5b7a5633af4b0aba19593bd08ee9ca","downloadUrl":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida/AP1WRLvssFhEC8reoy4NkTXAS6O-NgqiyQ3gTAQiZGCUUVyrjc2JYEMuYsK_A0HJOZC0ywQlGt8OXBw--BywfKCK9pkCsS5U4jz6jfLni1f1bR2kFbZrA-eGcw3uQa4io_MrA4MpA8J8YTBSDLxkHNqEDAaCYt2tpWX_tCvbwZ5X8Iv1hC-FDBnOeOIcIkTsFjWXZpS-1WunNOmmJlzkzjNQ5SelL7spEiq6sEkyOVUNLVVqTptkVZbax3bFaA"},"htmlCode":{"name":"projects/929484233158471895/files/a8a9b1e2388849a3a8a69bfe6ba054ce","downloadUrl":"https://contribution.usercontent.google.com/download?c=CgthaWRhX2NvZGVmeBJ6Eh1hcHBfY29tcGFuaW9uX2dlbmVyYXRlZF9maWxlcxpZCiVodG1sX2Q0MzQ3YzM4YTBkZTQwYTc4MTBlYTU4OWI0OTMzZWQ2EgsSBxCV1fjBpRoYAZIBIgoKcHJvamVjdF9pZBIUQhI5Mjk0ODQyMzMxNTg0NzE4OTU&filename=&opi=96797242","mimeType":"text/html"},"id":"3f380f21890c4a83bc5d187552c6d69c","generatedBy":"figaro_agent","width":"2560","height":"2048","title":"/oportunidades — Lista","prompt":"Create a desktop screen titled '/oportunidades — Lista'. Spanish UI. 
Leadiva Mint Pastel, Flat Institutional style.

SIDEBAR (Left):
- White background, 1px right border #d5e8e0.
- Three zones separated by thin dividers:
  1) TOP: Official Leadiva black line-art rocket logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_20}} and wordmark 'Leadiva'.
  2) MIDDLE: Label 'Búsquedas anteriores' with 3 list items (e.g., 'Licitación Software El Salvador', 'RFP Consultoría IA Banca', 'Términos de referencia COMPRASAL IT'). Use soft mint #d9eedb hover states. NO navigation links like 'Inicio' or 'Oportunidades'.
  3) BOTTOM: User profile with initials avatar 'DM' and name 'Diego Murillo Correa'. No 'Ver perfil' link.

MAIN CONTENT (Right):
- Background color #f4faf6.
- Vertical scrollable list of 6 opportunity cards.
- Each card: White panel, 1px border #d5e8e0, rounded-md (6-8px), no shadow.
- Card layout:
  - Top row: Bold title on the left (e.g., 'Modernización Red Ferroviaria El Salvador', 'Suministro Hardware Educativo', 'Servicios Cloud Banca Nacional', 'Consultoría Eficiencia Energética Ecopetrol', 'Mantenimiento Red Eléctrica ETESAL', 'Equipamiento Laboratorio Nacional') | Sector badge on the right ('Público' or 'Privado').
  - Middle row: Short description (2 lines max, secondary text #5f6b66).
  - Bottom row: 'Fecha límite: [Random Date 2024/2025]' in secondary text.
- Sector badges: Flat chips. 'Público' has soft mint #d9eedb fill. 'Privado' has soft peach #fbcab9 fill. Use dark text #1c1917 for readability.

BOTTOM AREA (Main content):
- A sticky, narrow full-width input bar at the bottom.
- Placeholder 'Pregunta a Leadiva'.
- Teal #05aba9 send button on the right.
- This corresponds to the dotted line box in wireframe {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_4}}.

FORBIDDEN:
- No data tables, KPI cards, or filter toolbars.
- No top navbar or marketing footers.
- No suggestion pill clusters in the list area.","name":"projects/929484233158471895/screens/3f380f21890c4a83bc5d187552c6d69c","theme":{"colorMode":"LIGHT","customColor":"#05aba9","headlineFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","bodyFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","labelFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","colorVariant":"TONAL_SPOT"},"deviceType":"DESKTOP","screenType":"DESIGN","screenMetadata":{"agentType":"PRO_AGENT","status":"COMPLETE"},"designSystem":{"name":"assets/8031487489663830885","designSystem":{"displayName":"Leadiva Mint Pastel","theme":{"colorMode":"LIGHT","customColor":"#05aba9","headlineFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","bodyFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","labelFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","designMd":"# Leadiva Flat — Mint Pastel Palette (user-provided strip)

Exact hex from reference strip (left → right):
1. Soft coral #f9a79b
2. Light peach #fbcab9  ← companion LEFT of center
3. Pale mint #d9eedb   ← CENTER / brand core
4. Light aqua #9ce5de  ← companion RIGHT of center
5. Deep teal #05aba9   ← CTA / interactive (AA contrast)

## Role mapping
- Brand soft / selected / KPI accents / soft badges: #d9eedb (center mint)
- Warm companion (zebra tint, secondary soft panels, warm chips): #fbcab9
- Cool companion (secondary buttons, borders accent, tags): #9ce5de
- Primary CTA, links, active nav bar, focus ring: #05aba9 (deep teal from same strip)
- CTA hover: darken teal ≈ #048f8d
- Optional warm accent for soft coral status open: #f9a79b

## Surfaces
- surface.base: #f4faf6 (mint-tinted canvas)
- surface.raised: #ffffff
- surface.border: #d5e8e0

## Text
- text.primary: #1c1917
- text.secondary: #5f6b66

## Status
- open: #05aba9 (or soft fill #d9eedb + text #048f8d)
- evaluating: use warm peach text on soft #fbcab9
- won: #05aba9 / mint family
- lost: keep semantic red #dc2626
- expiring: soft coral #f9a79b border/text
- inactive: #a8a29e

## Rules
Flat Institutional. No blue, no purple, no coral-as-primary CTA.
Center the UI around mint #d9eedb with peach + aqua companions.
CTAs must use deep teal #05aba9 for white text contrast.
1px borders, no skeuomorphism.
","colorVariant":"TONAL_SPOT"}},"version":"1"}}],"theme":{}}},{"text":"I have created the new **/oportunidades — Lista** screen, strictly adhering to your wireframe and the Leadiva Mint Pastel institutional style.

### Design Highlights:
- **Strict Sidebar Layout**: Implemented the three-zone shell (Branding, Previous Searches, and User Profile) with the official black line-art rocket logo.
- **Opportunity Feed**: Designed stacked white cards for El Salvador/LatAm tenders (COMPRASAL and private RFPs). These feature the specific chip colors you requested: soft mint for "Público" and soft peach for "Privado."
- **Institutional Clarity**: Maintained the #f4faf6 canvas with 1px #d5e8e0 borders and zero shadows, ensuring a flat, professional "Leadiva Flat" aesthetic.
- **Ask Integration**: Added the "Pregunta a Leadiva" input bar as a sticky element at the bottom of the main content area, providing a focused interface for refining searches as shown in the wireframe.

The screen is now available on the canvas for your review."},{"suggestion":"Add a filter drawer for sectors"},{"suggestion":"Show the detail view for one of these opportunities"},{"suggestion":"Adjust the card density"}]}

theme.designMd:
# Leadiva Flat — Mint Pastel Palette (user-provided strip)

Exact hex from reference strip (left → right):
1. Soft coral #f9a79b
2. Light peach #fbcab9  ← companion LEFT of center
3. Pale mint #d9eedb   ← CENTER / brand core
4. Light aqua #9ce5de  ← companion RIGHT of center
5. Deep teal #05aba9   ← CTA / interactive (AA contrast)

## Role mapping
- Brand soft / selected / KPI accents / soft badges: #d9eedb (center mint)
- Warm companion (zebra tint, secondary soft panels, warm chips): #fbcab9
- Cool companion (secondary buttons, borders accent, tags): #9ce5de
- Primary CTA, links, active nav bar, focus ring: #05aba9 (deep teal from same strip)
- CTA hover: darken teal ≈ #048f8d
- Optional warm accent for soft coral status open: #f9a79b

## Surfaces
- surface.base: #f4faf6 (mint-tinted canvas)
- surface.raised: #ffffff
- surface.border: #d5e8e0

## Text
- text.primary: #1c1917
- text.secondary: #5f6b66

## Status
- open: #05aba9 (or soft fill #d9eedb + text #048f8d)
- evaluating: use warm peach text on soft #fbcab9
- won: #05aba9 / mint family
- lost: keep semantic red #dc2626
- expiring: soft coral #f9a79b border/text
- inactive: #a8a29e

## Rules
Flat Institutional. No blue, no purple, no coral-as-primary CTA.
Center the UI around mint #d9eedb with peach + aqua companions.
CTAs must use deep teal #05aba9 for white text contrast.
1px borders, no skeuomorphism.

screens.name: projects/929484233158471895/screens/3f380f21890c4a83bc5d187552c6d69c
screens.prompt:
Create a desktop screen titled '/oportunidades — Lista'. Spanish UI. 
Leadiva Mint Pastel, Flat Institutional style.

SIDEBAR (Left):
- White background, 1px right border #d5e8e0.
- Three zones separated by thin dividers:
  1) TOP: Official Leadiva black line-art rocket logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_20}} and wordmark 'Leadiva'.
  2) MIDDLE: Label 'Búsquedas anteriores' with 3 list items (e.g., 'Licitación Software El Salvador', 'RFP Consultoría IA Banca', 'Términos de referencia COMPRASAL IT'). Use soft mint #d9eedb hover states. NO navigation links like 'Inicio' or 'Oportunidades'.
  3) BOTTOM: User profile with initials avatar 'DM' and name 'Diego Murillo Correa'. No 'Ver perfil' link.

MAIN CONTENT (Right):
- Background color #f4faf6.
- Vertical scrollable list of 6 opportunity cards.
- Each card: White panel, 1px border #d5e8e0, rounded-md (6-8px), no shadow.
- Card layout:
  - Top row: Bold title on the left (e.g., 'Modernización Red Ferroviaria El Salvador', 'Suministro Hardware Educativo', 'Servicios Cloud Banca Nacional', 'Consultoría Eficiencia Energética Ecopetrol', 'Mantenimiento Red Eléctrica ETESAL', 'Equipamiento Laboratorio Nacional') | Sector badge on the right ('Público' or 'Privado').
  - Middle row: Short description (2 lines max, secondary text #5f6b66).
  - Bottom row: 'Fecha límite: [Random Date 2024/2025]' in secondary text.
- Sector badges: Flat chips. 'Público' has soft mint #d9eedb fill. 'Privado' has soft peach #fbcab9 fill. Use dark text #1c1917 for readability.

BOTTOM AREA (Main content):
- A sticky, narrow full-width input bar at the bottom.
- Placeholder 'Pregunta a Leadiva'.
- Teal #05aba9 send button on the right.
- This corresponds to the dotted line box in wireframe {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_4}}.

FORBIDDEN:
- No data tables, KPI cards, or filter toolbars.
- No top navbar or marketing footers.
- No suggestion pill clusters in the list area.
screens.title: /oportunidades — Lista

outputComponents.text:
I have created the new **/oportunidades — Lista** screen, strictly adhering to your wireframe and the Leadiva Mint Pastel institutional style.

### Design Highlights:
- **Strict Sidebar Layout**: Implemented the three-zone shell (Branding, Previous Searches, and User Profile) with the official black line-art rocket logo.
- **Opportunity Feed**: Designed stacked white cards for El Salvador/LatAm tenders (COMPRASAL and private RFPs). These feature the specific chip colors you requested: soft mint for "Público" and soft peach for "Privado."
- **Institutional Clarity**: Maintained the #f4faf6 canvas with 1px #d5e8e0 borders and zero shadows, ensuring a flat, professional "Leadiva Flat" aesthetic.
- **Ask Integration**: Added the "Pregunta a Leadiva" input bar as a sticky element at the bottom of the main content area, providing a focused interface for refining searches as shown in the wireframe.

The screen is now available on the canvas for your review.

outputComponents.suggestion: Add a filter drawer for sectors
Show the detail view for one of these opportunities
